productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Striped Magenta Top
description: Composition Lilac, magenta, and black striped top with white accents, made of 100% cotton, with full sleeves that are ribbed from above the elbow to the hem, has a boat neck and a ribbed hem Fitting Comfort Wash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees using mild detergent Do not dry clean Do not tumble dry, wring, scrub or bleach Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Heightened style is what this top from united colors of benetton exudes. Perfect for those who never compromise on style and comfort, this top exudes feminity in all sense of the term and makes for a perfect winter wear. Team this with slim Fit jeans, sandals and long earnings for that cool chic look. Model statistics The model wears size M in t-shirts Height-5.8', Chest-33''
